titleStmt.title: SII 9.272: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 272. (A.R. No. 212 of 1918.) ON A PILLAR LYING NEAR THE KALLESVARASVAMI TEMPLE AT BADA-BENNEHALLI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1095, Jaya, Prathama-Āshāḍha, Śrāvaṇa, puṇṇame, Sōmagrahaṇa corresponding probably to A.D. 1173 June 27 Wednesday, when there was a lunar eclipse. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Jagadēkamalladēva and records the grant of land made by Noṇambachakravarti for the service of the god Noṇabēśvara in Harihara. It may be noted that at this period the Chāḷukya territory was under the Kaḷachuryas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastasahitaṁ śrīmajjagadēka
malladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarā
bhivri(r)ddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkatā
raṁbaraṁsaluttamire . sakavarṣa 1095 jaya saṁ
vatsarada prathamāsāḍa śrāvaṇada puṁṇname sō
magrahaṇadaṁdu hariharakṣētradalu
śrīnoṇbēsvaradēva(ri)rgge noṇaṁbacakravartti
biṭṭa bhūmi maiyiṁdūra dāriyiṁ mū
ḍa Eremattalu 2 haḷḷadiṁ paḍuvalu
Ūriṁda teṁka keṁgāḍa kaṁma 600 cīkaṭēṟa rā
mēsvarada gurugaḷige baḍada sivadēvanu rayara
sanu honnayanuṁ kalidēvara noṇbēsvara
dēvara vrittiyaṁ dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru

I dharmmava(ṁ)nāvanorvvaṁ pratipāḷisida vāraṇā
si kurukṣētra Argghyatīrttadali caturvvēdapāra
garappa brāhmaṇarige sāyira kavileya U
bhayamukhiyāgi koṭṭa phalamakku . I dharmmavanaḷi
dātaṁ vāraṇāsi gurukṣētradali sāyira kapile
yumaṁ sāyira brāhmaṇaruma(ṁ)naḷida paṁ
camahāpātakanakku . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō
harēti vasuṁdharāṁ . saṣṭirvvarṣasahaśrāṇi I
ṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . Ivara dēvastānamaṁ brā(ṁ)
hmaṇaru pūdisuvaru .
Digital edition of SII 9.272 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
